# Sashwin Foundation: Architectural Excellence & Luxury Investments

## Executive Summary
Sashwin Foundation is a premier luxury construction, engineering, and architectural firm based in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, with over 25 years of documented expertise. The firm operates under the philosophy: "We Build Assets… Not Expenses." Specializing in high-end residential villas, commercial infrastructure, and fractional resort investments.

## Core Offerings

### 1. Mishti Holiday Homes (Resort Investment)
- **Concept**: A luxury resort community villa investment model.
- **Location**: Tholampalayam Road, Coimbatore (50 metres from Mettupalayam Road).
- **Structure**: Only 35 exclusive shares available for generational wealth.
- **Financials**: ₹48.50 Lakhs per share. Up to 50% bank loan support.
- **Returns**: 50:50 rental revenue sharing. No lock-in period. Zero hidden charges.
- **Verification**: Built to ISO standards with managed hospitality and material transparency.

### 2. Residential Masterpieces
- **Locations**: Karamadai to Vellingadu Road, Coimbatore.
- **Pricing**: 2BHK starting from ₹25 Lakhs; 3BHK from ₹47.5 Lakhs.
- **Financing**: Up to 90% loan support.
- **Incentive**: FREE professional interior design included with every project.

### 3. Construction Vertical
- **Rate**: Starting from ₹2,650 per sq.ft.
- **USP**: 
  - **Direct Labour**: No outsourcing middlemen, resulting in significant cost savings.
  - **In-house Expertise**: Dedicated team of Architects and Engineers.
  - **On-site Supervision**: Rigorous quality control at every phase.
  - **Material Transparency**: Clients have full visibility into material procurement.

## Operational Details
- **Headquarters (HQ)**: #347 D, Sakthi complex, 1st floor, thiruvalluvar street, vellaikinaru pirivu, G.N.Mills, near Martin home, Coimbatore - 641026.
- **Chennai Branch**: No.11, Devaki Nagar, Ponniammanmedu, Chennai – 600 110.
- **Contact Channels**: 
  - Primary: +91 90475 90675
  - Secondary: +91 90470 35184
  - Email: sashwinfoundation@gmail.com
- **Official Website**: https://sashwinfoundation.com

## Technical & ISO Standards
All projects are strictly ISO compliant. The firm utilizes Integrated BIM (Building Information Modeling) and advanced Thermodynamic engineering for half-century structural longevity. Every pixel of the portfolio represents a documented truth of architectural efficiency across South India.
